channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8547] Interop b2_8<->master: ost-pools test_24: Pool name () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d24.ost-pools/dir3/f24.ost-pools0(test_85b)
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/797bde76-5f00-11e6-906c-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_24 failed with the following error:

Pool name () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d24.ost-pools/dir3/f24.ost-pools0(test_85b)

test logs:

== ost-pools test 24: Independence of pool from other setstripe parameters =========================== 23:13:12 (1470809592)
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_new lustre.testpool
trevis-50vm3: Pool lustre.testpool created
CMD: trevis-50vm5 lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.testpool         2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-50vm5 lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.testpool         2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_add lustre.testpool lustre-OST[0000-0006/1]
trevis-50vm3: OST lustre-OST0000_UUID added to pool lustre.testpool
trevis-50vm3: OST lustre-OST0001_UUID added to pool lustre.testpool
trevis-50vm3: OST lustre-OST0002_UUID added to pool lustre.testpool
trevis-50vm3: OST lustre-OST0003_UUID added to pool lustre.testpool
trevis-50vm3: OST lustre-OST0004_UUID added to pool lustre.testpool
trevis-50vm3: OST lustre-OST0005_UUID added to pool lustre.testpool
trevis-50vm3: OST lustre-OST0006_UUID added to pool lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm5 lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.testpool |
		sort -u | tr '\n' ' ' 
CMD: trevis-50vm5 lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.testpool |
		sort -u | tr '\n' ' ' 
total: 10 creates in 0.03 seconds: 340.30 creates/second
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
total: 10 creates in 0.02 seconds: 431.03 creates/second
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
CMD: trevis-50vm3 lctl pool_list lustre.testpool
total: 10 creates in 0.02 seconds: 476.10 creates/second
 ost-pools test_24: @@@@@@ FAIL: Pool name () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d24.ost-pools/dir3/f24.ost-pools0(test_85b)

Might be related to LU-5030 .
item.summary: Interop b2_8<->master: ost-pools test_24: Pool name () not inherited in /mnt/lustre/d24.ost-pools/dir3/f24.ost-pools0(test_85b)

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/22533/
Subject: LU-8547 test: Skip ost-pools test_24 for older MDS version
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 8d4cc1c8a894ad93988b22489f46fee64b650d4d

Saurabh Tandan (saurabh.tandan@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/22533
Subject: LU-8547 test: Skip ost-pools test_24 for older MDS version
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 436534f94c66727227e4087ed3f39460cd052add

This test was affected by patch http://review.whamcloud.com/19041:

LU-7660 dne: support fs default stripe
    
    On DNE system slave MDTs should honor fs default stripe, to achieve
    this, slave MDT should lock fs root, and cache XATTR_NAME_LOV

Saurabh, could you please should be skipped when testing against MDS versions before 2.8.56.
